HGSS.334.0000:
Lt. Surge: Oh, yay!
You have the Pokémon I love best:\r
PIKACHU!\f
Excellent!
I’ll give you my telephone number! [0200,0000]
HGSS.334.0001:
[0103,0000,0000] registered Lt. Surge
in the Pokégear!
HGSS.334.0002:
Lt. Surge: Give me a call on Friday
morning!\f
We can have an electrifying battle!
HGSS.334.0003:
Lt. Surge: Oh no!
How disappointing!
HGSS.334.0004:
Lt. Surge: Aha!
Now you want to know my telephone\r
number, don’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.334.0005:
Lt. Surge: Oh! What are the chances
of seeing you at a place like this?\f
I can feel electric power around
the Power Plant.\f
You may want to catch a PIKACHU in
the Viridian Forest and bring it here!
HGSS.334.0006:
There is a large Pokémon staring
at you...!\f
